category: Idle / standby meters (truly-idle NON-NEM service agreements paying customer/standby charges)

findings.title: Idle P075 on AGC: demote to AG-A1 (reversible)
findings.formula: annualUsd = (dailyCust_AGC[$1.43343/day] - dailyCust_AGA1[$0.68895/day]) x 365 days = $0.74448/day x 365 = $271.74/yr (reversible demote at 0 kWh; energy term $0 on both schedules)
findings.computedBy: src/lib/energy/rateCompare.ts at 0 kWh (customer-charge differential). Deterministic arithmetic, NOT AI; the only AI in the pipeline is the bill-PDF vision extraction in src/lib/extract that produced the customer-charge line items.
findings.evidence: SA 4692166716 (P075) on AGC/HAGC, latest cycle totalKwh=0, demandChargeUsd_structured=null, nemNetChargeUsd=0, nem.nemEnrolled=false -> truly idle, not NEM-netting. Printed cycle total = $43.00/mo, all of it the customer (standby) charge. Demote AGC->AGA1: ($1.43343-$0.68895)/day x 365 = $271.74/yr, reversible, zero operational change. CLOSE-SERVICE upside (permanent, not in total): full $43.00/mo eliminated = $523.20/yr. Inventory: status=GOOD, note='not using', ranch=OFFICE, gpm=1000.

findings.title: Idle P069 already on AGA1 floor: close-service upside only
findings.formula: defensible demote annualUsd = $0 (already at AG-A1 $0.68895/day floor). Close-service UPSIDE = dailyCust_AGA1[$0.68895/day] x 365 = $251.47/yr (permanent, not in total).
findings.computedBy: src/lib/energy/rateCompare.ts at 0 kWh (customer-charge differential). Deterministic arithmetic, NOT AI; the only AI is bill-PDF vision extraction in src/lib/extract.
findings.evidence: SA 4699664012 (P069) on AGA1/HAGA1, latest cycle totalKwh=0, demand=null, nemNetChargeUsd=0, nem.nemEnrolled=false -> truly idle, not NEM-netting. Already at the AG-A1 floor customer charge ($20.67/mo = $0.68895/day x 30), so the reversible demote lever yields $0 (nothing above the floor to shed; at 0 kWh any AG-A2 Max-Demand exposure is also $0). The ONLY remaining lever is CLOSE-SERVICE (permanent): $20.67/mo x 365/30 = $251.47/yr eliminated. Reported as upside, NOT in the defensible demote total because closing the SA is a permanent grower decision with reconnection downside. Inventory: status=BAD, note='not using', ranch=KAMM CORNELIA, gpm=150.
